name: Minecraft Essentials
description: Install, upgrade, run, migrate, back up, and troubleshoot Minecraft Java servers with clear local setup and join guidance.
short_description: Run, upgrade, and fix Minecraft Java servers.
audience: Minecraft server hosts maintaining local or small-group Java servers
Players moving from ad hoc launch scripts to safer Paper, Vanilla, or Fabric setups
Builders troubleshooting backups, plugins, Java versions, LAN joins, and migration paths
detail_lines: Starts with a server audit, world and config backup, Java version check, and clear choice between Vanilla, Paper, or Fabric.
Surfaces same-machine, LAN, and hostname join info without implying that public exposure is safe by default.
Treats compatibility plugins, Bedrock bridging, major upgrades, and always-on hosting as explicit operational decisions.
